SELECT test_time FROM time_test WHERE test_time = time(6) '12:00:00.000000';
SELECT test_time FROM time_test WHERE test_time < time(6) '13:00:00.000000';
SELECT test_time FROM time_test WHERE test_time BETWEEN time(6) '00:00:00.000000' AND time(6) '23:59:59.999999';
CREATE TABLE time_test2 (id INT, event_time TIME(6));
SELECT t1.test_time, t2.event_time FROM time_test t1 INNER JOIN time_test2 t2 ON t1.test_time = t2.event_time WHERE t1.test_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM time_test WHERE test_time > (SELECT AVG(event_time) FROM time_test2);
SELECT t1.test_time FROM time_test t1 LEFT JOIN time_test2 t2 ON t1.test_time = t2.event_time WHERE t2.id IS NULL;
SELECT time(6)(CAST('14:30:59.500000' AS VARCHAR)) AS converted_time;
INSERT INTO time_test VALUES (time(6) (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM time_test2));
SELECT DISTINCT time(6) '19:12:00.123456' AS unique_time FROM time_test;
SELECT t1.test_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM time_test2 WHERE event_time < t1.test_time) AS count_less FROM time_test t1;
